title: pinaropappus junceus
intro: Pinaropappus junceus, also known as the greasewood or greasewood plant, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been found to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of Pinaropappus junceus are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
